concerns.analysis: Multiple URLs in the output are incorrect or non-functional because they were truncated or misparsed during conversion. In the 'Useful Links' section on page 3, the href for the 'Cybersecurity and Risk Management Site' is truncated to 'http://it.nc.gov/statewide-resources/cybersecurity-and-risk', and the href for the 'Cybersecurity Awareness Page' is truncated to 'https://it.nc.gov/statewide-resources/cybersecurity-and'. There is a visual duplication of heading text in the HTML output. The header 'INSIDER THREAT TIP CARD' appears twice consecutively at the beginning of that section. In the source PDF (page 4), this heading appears only once as a large title. In the HTML rendering, it appears once as a section label (likely generated from the Table of Contents logic) and again immediately below as the content heading. This creates redundant visual clutter that is not present in the original document.

concerns.analysis: There is a consistent wording error across multiple pages. The source document uses the term 'electronic crime events' (Pages 1 and 4), whereas the output identifies them as 'electric crime events'. This is a minor text difference that slightly alters the technical meaning of the statistic.
